mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in non-farm payrolls indicates a strengthening labor market and robust economic expansion, which typically leads to higher inflation expectations and increased demand for capital, pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Strong employment growth historically correlates with rising yields
failure_condition: PAYEMS shows consistent growth, but the 20-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is negative in more than 55% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in consumer price inflation signals a loss of purchasing power and potential future monetary policy tightening, prompting investors to demand higher compensation for holding long-term debt, thus increasing 10-year Treasury yields over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Inflationary pressures lead to higher nominal yields
failure_condition: When CPIAUCSL monthly change exceeds 0.3%, the 20-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is negative or flat in the majority of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of robust retail sales and declining unemployment indicates strong consumer demand and a tightening labor market, signaling broad economic strength that increases expectations for future growth and inflation, driving 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month average growth > 0.5% AND UNRATE 3-month average change < -0.1pp
evidence_refs: fact:Strong consumer activity and labor markets boost economic outlook
failure_condition: Periods where both RSAFS shows strong growth and UNRATE declines consistently do not result in positive 60-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained recovery in housing starts indicates renewed confidence in the economy and a pickup in investment, which contributes to overall economic growth and higher long-term interest rates, pushing 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Housing market recovery is a key driver of broader economic recovery
failure_condition: During post-recession periods, when HOUST exceeds 800k units, the 20-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is predominantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in industrial production reflects increasing manufacturing output and capacity utilization, signaling a healthy supply side of the economy that supports higher growth and inflation expectations, leading to higher 10-year Treasury yields over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Industrial activity is a leading indicator of economic health
failure_condition: When INDPRO shows positive monthly growth, the 5-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is negative in more than 50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate maintained at historically low levels (near zero) indicates an accommodative monetary policy stance, reflecting underlying economic weakness or disinflationary pressures, which tends to anchor long-term yields lower over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Zero Lower Bound policy implies low long-term rates
failure_condition: During ZLB periods (FEDFUNDS < 0.25%), the 60-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is predominantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth indicates robust aggregate demand and overall economic expansion, which typically translates into higher future inflation and interest rates, driving 10-year Treasury yields higher over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Higher GDP growth is associated with higher long-term yields
failure_condition: When GDPC1 quarterly annualized growth exceeds 2.0%, the 20-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is negative in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A significant increase in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market and potential economic contraction, leading to lower inflation expectations and a flight to safety, which puts downward pressure on 10-year Treasury yields over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.2pp over 3 months, the 5-day forward 10-year Treasury yield direction is predominantly positive.
